task_completion.description: Access the GNU Health web interface via Firefox
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox browser is open and displaying the GNU Health interface at localhost:8000.

task_completion.description: Open a new Patient Evaluation form
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new 'Patient Evaluation' form or tab is open and ready for data entry.
The Patient field in the evaluation form is filled with 'Ana Betz' or 'Ana Isabel Betz'.

task_completion.description: Set the Evaluation Type and Urgency
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Evaluation Type' dropdown/field is set to 'Ambulatory' and the 'Urgency' dropdown/field is set to 'Urgent'.
The 'Chief Complaint' field contains 'Laceration on right hand from industrial machinery' (or at minimum contains the keyword 'laceration').

task_completion.description: Enter the Present Illness and save the record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Present Illness' field contains the detailed description of the workplace injury, and the record appears saved (e.g., form is in a saved state, save icon is inactive, or a new record tab is created).

integrity.description: Agent used the Firefox GUI to interact with GNU Health
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Firefox browser and GNU Health web interface being used, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual GNU Health application
integrity.visual_evidence: Data is entered into the actual GNU Health form fields, not a text editor, notes app, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent actually saved the record instead of just filling the form
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show evidence of saving, such as clicking the save button, a success notification, or the form transitioning to a saved/read-only state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target patient is 'Ana Isabel Betz' (often displayed as Ana Betz). The Chief Complaint must contain the keyword 'laceration'. The Present Illness must be a detailed description of the workplace injury (length > 10 characters).
